pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 32 (Dockerfile): RUN adduser -D -u 1000 agent; line 34: USER agent; line 45 (docker-compose.yml): user: agent

privileged_info_summary: The task sets up a Docker build-agent service at /home/ga/build-agent using docker:cli base image. The service runs in a container named 'build-agent' with a non-root user 'agent' (UID 1000). The container mounts the host's Docker socket (/var/run/docker.sock) to enable Docker access from within the container. Success criteria require the container to run as non-root user (UID 1000), maintain functional Docker socket access, and preserve host socket permissions without world-writable modifications.
